subcodes.first_line: Say: This is a cup filled with the mercy of God; drink ye thereof, O people of the Bayán! Say: This is a chalice wherein surgeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل هذا کاس ملات من رحمه الله فاشربوا منه یا اهل البیان قل هذا کوب موجت فیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love as fire, @Manifestation of God as sun, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @symbolism, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
